Event: Royal Challenge - Season 15
Event Date: 01/07/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: AM98
Shining Jewel Amulet

Once in a while, when taking damage, the unit blinds and disarms the enemy who dealt the damage for 4 sec. This enemy has a 80% chance to miss the target and cannot use their weapon’s ability for 4 sec. The effect can only be triggered once every 0,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
